case_title: CORWIN, ARTHUR VS THE VILLAGES AT TREASURE ISLAND

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY CORWIN, ARTHUR AS TO DEFENDANT THE VILLAGES AT TREASURE ISLAND ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-16-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAILING TO REGINALD HAIRSTON, ADM. VILLAGES AT TREASURE ISLAND RETURNED TO COURT SIGNED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CORWIN, ARTHUR IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT THE VILLAGES AT TREASURE ISLAND REGINALD HAIRSTON IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AND IS REPLACED BY THE VILLAGES AT TREASURE ISLAND AS DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
